failed_transfer.label: Debited but recipient not credited
failed_transfer.clarification_en: Please send the transaction ID, time, and amount so I can check it.
failed_transfer.clarification_yo: Jowo fi transaction ID, akoko, ati iye owo ranse ki n le sayewo.

pending_transfer.label: Pending transfer retry advice
pending_transfer.clarification_en: Please send the transaction ID, time, and amount. Do not retry the transfer until I check it.
pending_transfer.clarification_yo: Jowo fi transaction ID, akoko, ati iye owo ranse. Ma tun transfer naa se titi emi yoo fi sayewo.

pending_reversal.label: Pending reversal status
pending_reversal.clarification_en: Please send the transaction ID, original transaction time, and amount so I can check the reversal.
pending_reversal.clarification_yo: Jowo fi transaction ID, akoko transaction akoko, ati iye owo ranse ki n le sayewo reversal naa.

double_debit_pos.label: Double debit on failed POS transaction
double_debit_pos.clarification_en: Please send the transaction ID, time, and amount. I may also need the decline slip and debit alert to escalate it.
double_debit_pos.clarification_yo: Jowo fi transaction ID, akoko, ati iye owo ranse. Mo le nilo decline slip ati debit alert lati gbe e lo si disputes team.

kyc_restriction.label: Account frozen due to KYC or suspicious activity flag
kyc_restriction.clarification_en: Please send the registered phone number so I can check the account restriction.
kyc_restriction.clarification_yo: Jowo fi nomba foonu account ranse ki n le sayewo restriction naa.
